creator: marcus@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I no longer have a GNOME 2.18 machine, but in GNOME 2.20, the User Switching 
applet has a setting to not lock the screen on switches.  I tested this 
locally, and it works.  If you cannot find that setting on 2.18, upgrade 
to 2.20.
